title: Repealed by Acts 2013, No. 325, §2, eff. Dec. 31, 2014.
doc_html:
§981. Repealed by Acts 2013, No. 325, §2, eff. Dec. 31, 2014.

 

NOTE: Former R.S. 22:981 redesignated as R.S. 22:331 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
